---
title: "Projetos de pesquisa"
lang: pt
description: |
  Projetos de pesquisa dos quais participei ou estou participando ativamente.
listing:
  - id: active
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 100px
    fields: [image, title, description]
    contents:
      - seewandell/index.pt.qmd
    sort: "false"
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: false

  - id: past
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 100px
    fields: [image, title, description]
    contents:
      - RocasAtoll/index.pt.qmd
    sort: "false"
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: false
---

::: {.lang-switch}
🌐 [English](index_sci_pro.qmd) · [Italiano](index_sci_pro.it.qmd) · [Español](index_sci_pro.es.qmd) · **Português** · [Français](index_sci_pro.fr.qmd) · [Deutsch](index_sci_pro.de.qmd)
:::

## Projetos ativos

::: {#active}
:::

## Projetos anteriores

::: {#past}
:::
